post.description: Executes an ACID-compliant MongoDB database transaction to checkout the user's current shopping cart. It automatically validates and decrements inventory stocks, calculates the aggregated grand total, generates an immutable order invoice receipt, and sweeps the user's cart clear upon transactional success.

201.description: Order placed successfully. Returns the finalized immutable historical invoice receipt object.

400.description: Validation or Inventory Stock Fault. Thrown if the user's shopping cart is completely empty, or if requested item quantities exceed live product stock levels (triggering a safe transaction rollback).

emptyCart.value: Cannot place an order with an empty cart

insufficientStock.value: Transaction Aborted: Insufficient stock for product id 64bcf123e4b0cc123456789a

41.description: Unauthorized: Access token is missing, expired, or structural signatures are invalid.

500.description: Database transaction exception crash or lookup aggregation mapping calculation drop.

_id.description: The unique document identifier generated by MongoDB for the order entry record.

userId.description: The Hex String target reference point mapping to the buying customer account user ID.

totalAmount.description: The grand total billing invoice aggregate computed via back-end lookups.

items.description: Snapshot arrays capture record states from checkout transactions.

orderDate.description: The absolute calendar server execution baseline ISO snapshot timestamp when the database transaction successfully committed.
